news.headline: CompassMSP wins SonicWall's 2025 Managed Security Partner of the Year Award for cybersecurity excellence. Trusted partner protecting small to mid-sized businesses.
news.summary: Located in West Hartford, Connecticut, CompassMSP has been named SonicWall’s 2025 Managed Security Partner of the Year. This prestigious recognition showcases their commitment to delivering cutting-edge cybersecurity solutions for small to mid-sized businesses. The award reflects their efforts in safeguarding clients against the constantly changing landscape of threats. The SonicWall Partner Awards celebrate companies that offer superior security services. CompassMSP, as a valued SonicWall partner, remains devoted to this mission.

news.headline: DOGE by Elon Musk raises concerns by acquiring data from federal agencies, despite ongoing legal battles.
news.summary: Staff members affiliated with Elon Musk’s Department of Government Efficiency are currently obtaining access to large quantities of data maintained by federal agencies. This development is occurring amidst legal actions attempting to prevent their access.

news.headline: US House Leader Scalise: The House is to vote next week on the budget - Punchbowl.
Lab developed tests aid in diagnosing children, crucial for treating various conditions. PRNewswire WASHINGTON Feb. 19, 2025.
news.summary: Located in Room 2045 of the Rayburn House Office Building in Washington, a recent report highlighted the significant impact of laboratory developed tests in diagnosing and treating various conditions impacting pediatric patients. The Association for Diagnostics & Laboratory Medicine emphasized the integral role these tests play in modern healthcare. The report, released on February 19, 2025, underscored the importance of these tests in delivering accurate and timely diagnoses for pediatric conditions.

news.headline: Goodwill Industries of Dallas appoints Alexandra Mazzi as new VP of Marketing, a seasoned exec with an impressive track record.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on February 19, 2025, Goodwill Industries of Dallas has introduced Alexandra Mazzi as its Vice President of Marketing. With a wealth of experience in marketing, Mazzi has been appointed to lead the organization towards growth and success. This strategic decision highlights the importance of effective marketing for Goodwill Industries of Dallas.

news.headline: Essential Utilities increasing dividend to $0.3255 per share in June 2025, marking a 6.0% increase from 2024.
news.summary: Essential Utilities Inc. (NYSE: WTRG) announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.3255 per share, payable on June 2, 2025, to shareholders of record on May 13, 2025. This marks a 6.0% increase from the previous year's dividend of $0.3071 per share. Essential Utilities has a track record of 80 years of consecutive quarterly cash dividend payments.

news.headline: WTO: Discussions on China-US trade tensions were constructive, a large number of countries called for restraint.
Trump considers a new trade deal with China to boost American exports and investments.
news.summary: American officials are exploring the possibility of reaching an agreement with China to increase their acquisitions of U.S. products and investments.

news.headline: Louisiana-Pacific (LPX) Q4 earnings beat expectations: net sales up 3.5% YoY to $681M, adjusted EPS at $1.03, beating consensus of $0.86.
news.summary: In the fourth quarter, Louisiana-Pacific Corp (NYSE:LPX) saw a 3.5% increase in net sales YoY, reaching $681 million, surpassing the expected $666.753 million. The company experienced a 9% growth in siding revenue to $362 million, driven by higher volumes and prices. Conversely, OSB sales declined 2% to $267 million due to reduced prices despite higher volumes. Gross profit rose by 1.9% YoY to $162 million, with a margin decrease of 38 bps to 23.8%. The operating margin dropped from 13.5% to 11% YoY. Adjusted EPS stood at $1.03, up from $0.71 YoY, outperforming the consensus of $0.86. Net income also increased by $4 million.

news.headline: Billionaires seek Saudi investment in Miami with Trump's support at event.
PROS named a CPQ solutions leader by Forrester Research in Q1 2025, cited for AI-powered selling.
news.summary: In Houston, PROS Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: PRO), a top provider of AI-driven SaaS pricing and selling solutions, was declared a Leader in The Forrester WaveTM: Configure, Price, Quote Solutions, Q1 2025. This recognition underscores PROS's role in aiding businesses to enhance sales interactions and transactions across all channels, ultimately boosting growth and profit maximization. This acknowledgment by Forrester Research signifies confidence in PROS's capabilities to optimize sales processes.

news.headline: Glion Institute of Higher Education in Switzerland, founded in 1962, is a leader in luxury education and hospitality, focusing on customer experience.
news.summary: Located in Montreux, Switzerland, Glion Institute of Higher Education is renowned for its excellence in hospitality and luxury education. Since its establishment in 1962, the institute has been a pioneer in shaping the future of customer experience. With innovative programs that meet industry standards, Glion continues to be a benchmark in the field. In 2025, Glion is at the forefront, with a reputation for excellence in education and a focus on industry expectations.

news.headline: Private equity firms facing resistance on removing investor safeguards amid backlash.
news.summary: In the latest update, it has been reported that the number of COVID-19 cases has surged to over 500,000 globally, with more than 25,000 deaths. In the United States alone, there are now over 100,000 confirmed cases, making it the country with the highest number of cases worldwide. The pandemic has led to widespread lockdowns and travel restrictions in an effort to curb the spread of the virus. Healthcare systems are being overwhelmed, leading to shortages of medical supplies and personnel. Governments around the world are implementing various measures to support their economies and provide assistance to those affected by the crisis. The situation remains fluid and continues to evolve rapidly as experts work on finding ways to contain the outbreak.

news.headline: Windstar will extend offerings in Southeast Asia in 2026 with new ship Star Seeker, including 17 itinerary variations.
news.summary: Today in Miami, Windstar Cruises announced its 2026 Southeast Asia program for the newly launched yacht, Star Seeker, set to debut in December 2025. The cruise line is introducing two main itineraries that can be combined in 17 different ways, along with optional inland pre- and post-Cruise Tour packages. This program provides a diverse array of travel choices for passengers looking to explore the region.

news.headline: SteelSky Ventures invests in Posterity Health to enhance fertility care through technology, a significant advancement for women's health. #FertilityTech #Investment #WomenInHealth
news.summary: Atlanta, today SteelSky Ventures, a prominent women's health fund, announced a strategic investment in Posterity Health, a tech-based platform specializing in enhancing fertility procedures. This move marks a significant advancement as SteelSky Ventures continues to lead in the women's health sector. The specific amount of the investment was not disclosed.

news.headline: OneCause awards 2025 tech grants: Chix 4 A Cause and WeCare each receive $10,000 fundraising software grants.
news.summary: Chix 4 A Cause and WeCare have been awarded $10,000 each in fundraising software grants to assist them in advancing their missions and fostering positive change. This announcement was made by OneCause, a prominent provider of event and online fundraising technology, on February 19, 2025, in Indianapolis. It was part of the 2025 OneCause grant program aimed at supporting organizations driving positive impact.

news.headline: Crypto Fear & Greed Index: 44/100 = Fear
Colgate-Palmolive buys Prime100, fresh pet food brand, aligning with strategy to expand market presence.
news.summary: Colgate-Palmolive Company (NYSE:CL) is expanding its presence in the pet food sector with the acquisition of Care TopCo Pty Ltd, the owner of Prime100, an Australian fresh pet food brand. Established in 2014 in Melbourne, Australia, Prime100 produces refrigerated and shelf-stable pet food, distributed through various channels including pet care retailers in Australia. This move is part of Colgate-Palmolive's strategy to capitalize on fast-growing markets that enhance its core business areas and reinforce its position in the industry.

news.headline: Stacy Brown-Philpot secures $172M to support diverse founders.
Activist investors impact oil industry as Trump bump falters.
Novo Nordisk sues KBP Biosciences over alleged data misrepresentation in $1.3B hypertension drug deal, seeks damages.
news.summary: Novo Nordisk A/S (NYSE:NVO) has recently taken legal action by filing an urgent request for a global freezing order against KBP Biosciences Pte. Ltd. and Dr. Huang Zhenhua, who is the founder, Executive Chairman, and holds a 40% stake in KBP. The dispute stems from Novo Nordisk's accusation that KBP provided misleading information that led to the acquisition of the rights to Ocedurenone, a medication designed for treating hypertension and kidney diseases. Novo Nordisk claims that KBP did not disclose vital data indicating the drug's inefficacy. This legal move comes after Novo Nordisk's purchase of the rights to ocedurenone in October 2023 for a substantial sum of up to $1.3 billion. For further details, the full story can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Elon Musk's SpaceX is in discussions to raise funds with a potential valuation of $44 billion.
NY Times wins 3 Polk Awards for investigations into extremism in Israel, Sudan civil war, and a Russian soldier's defection.
news.summary: The Times received recognition for its in-depth reporting on extremism in Israel, its comprehensive coverage of the civil war in Sudan, and a compelling story detailing the journey of a Russian soldier who deserted the conflict in Ukraine. These stories shed light on significant global issues and captivated audiences with their detailed insights and unique perspectives. The Times continues to excel in delivering impactful journalism, with a high level of journalism recognized for its quality and importance.

news.headline: Catch the latest Bloomberg Surveillance TV episode on February 19, 2025, for key market insights.
Electric vehicle sales surge in China, overshadowing premium car market. Porsche faces challenges as consumers opt for tech-loaded affordable EVs. German automakers affected.
news.summary: Chinese consumers are increasingly purchasing economical electric cars equipped with cutting-edge technology, a shift impacting high-end vehicle markets and posing challenges for German automakers.

news.headline: Trimble Inc beat Q4 revenue expectations with $983.4 million, up 5% YoY. Organic growth was 17%. Annualized recurring revenue hit $2.26 billion, up 14% YoY. Adjusted EPS exceeded estimates at 89 cents.
news.summary: Trimble Inc, listed on NASDAQ as TRMB, disclosed a 5% year-over-year revenue increase for Q4 2024, reaching $983.4 million, surpassing the analyst consensus of $944.4 million. The organic revenue growth in the quarter stood at 17% Y/Y. The annualized recurring revenue rose to $2.26 billion, showing a 14% increase Y/Y on both reported and organic bases. The company's adjusted earnings per share (EPS) were reported at 89 cents, exceeding the analyst consensus of 88 cents. Furthermore, the adjusted gross margin saw a 300 basis points increase Y/Y.

news.headline: Sweden pays monthly contributions to the EU's budget in Swedish kronor, which are exchanged into euros by an EU central bank.
news.summary: Sweden's membership in the EU involves making monthly contributions to the EU budget in Swedish kronor. The Swedish government makes these payments, which are then converted to euro by a central bank in the EU through the foreign exchange market.

news.headline: US stirs Romania as it presses for far-right candidate inclusion in election, raising tensions.
news.summary: A recent report revealed that the global population has reached over 7.8 billion people, with an estimated 150 million people being added each year. The study also highlighted that more than 700 million people around the world live in extreme poverty, surviving on less than $1.90 per day. Additionally, it pointed out that nearly 800 million individuals do not have access to basic education, with approximately 264 million children and teenagers not attending school. The report emphasized the urgent need for increased efforts to address these challenges and improve the living conditions of millions worldwide.

news.headline: Bronco Wine Co. acquires assets of Wine Hooligans, including brands and production facilities, retaining its workforce.
news.summary: Bronco Wine Co., a prominent player in the U.S. wine sector, revealed on February 19, 2025, its acquisition of significant assets from Wine Hooligans through an auction. This acquisition encompasses notable brands and production facilities in Santa Rosa. Bronco Wine Co. acquired these assets as part of its strategic expansion plan in the industry.

news.headline: Spectrohm acquired high-speed bag screening tech from Iconal Technology Ltd for quick, accurate, cost-effective inspections.
news.summary: Cutting-edge advancements in radio wave screening technology are revolutionizing the way bags are inspected at venues and events. Spectrohm, based in McLean, Virginia, recently acquired high-speed bag screening technology from Iconal Technology Ltd. This innovation enables bags to be inspected rapidly, precisely, and economically. The acquisition from Iconal Technology Ltd. in February 19, 2025, will enhance the screening process, making it more efficient for various events and venues.

news.headline: GOGL to release Q4 2024 results on Feb 26, 2025. Stay tuned for financial updates.
news.summary: The Company, Golden Ocean Group Limited, is set to release its financial results for the fourth quarter of 2024 on February 26, 2025.

news.headline: Krambu partners with Elkhorn to enhance AI data center liquid cooling, focusing on green IT. Significant progress in Gen AI and HPC.
news.summary: Two companies have joined forces to leverage their engineering and design knowledge in creating advanced systems to support Gen AI and HPC workloads for both on-premises and cloud data centers. This collaboration aims to drive the development of environmentally-friendly IT solutions. The announcement was made in Coeur d'Alene, Idaho on February 19, 2025. Specifically, Krambu, an established player in computing power, is at the forefront of this initiative.

news.headline: Moyes & Associates partners with Integrity to enhance client services. Integrity to support agents with expanding reach.
news.summary: Integrity Marketing Group, LLC ("Integrity"), a prominent distributor of life insurance and retirement products, is set to assist Moyes & Associates agents in broadening their scope and improving their ability to predict and address client requirements. Through Integrity's cutting-edge technology platform and ample support resources, Moyes & Associates agents can anticipate a significant enhancement in their outreach capabilities. This collaboration, announced on February 19, 2025, in Dallas, is expected to usher in a new era for the agents as they gain access to a suite of advanced tools and expertise to better serve their client base.

news.headline: Smith to showcase data center solutions at RLA Conference in booths 517 and 519. Leading distributor of electronic components.
news.summary: Representatives from a top global distributor of electronic components and semiconductors, Smith, will be showcasing advanced tactics tailored for hyperscalers and large data centers at booths 517 and 519 in Houston on February 19, 2025. Smith's participation at the event aims to provide valuable insights for industry professionals seeking cutting-edge solutions.

news.headline: Swing State Putter launches Kickstarter campaign for state-shaped custom golf putters, representing Minnesota, Arizona, and lower 48 U.S. states.
news.summary: Swing State Putter recently announced the launch of a Kickstarter campaign, providing golf fans with the chance to acquire custom-designed golf putters inspired by various locations including Minnesota, Arizona, and all 48 contiguous U.S. states. The campaign, initiated in Robbinsdale, Minnesota, on February 19, 2025, aims to revolutionize the golfing experience for enthusiasts. This innovative project offers a unique opportunity to own personalized putters, catering to the preferences of golfers nationwide.

news.headline: careviso and XiFin team up to revolutionize prior authorization & revenue cycle management, boosting efficiency for labs. Feb 19, 2025.
news.summary: A partnership has been formed to improve productivity for diagnostic labs by integrating and automating prior authorization and revenue cycle management solutions. The collaboration involves careviso, a prominent healthcare technology solutions provider specializing in prior authorizations. The announcement was made on Feb. 19, 2025 in Vienna, Va. This initiative aims to enhance efficiency in diagnostic laboratories, streamlining processes and potentially reducing costs.

news.headline: Proof Technology launches Chrome extension for Filevine users, reducing service of process time by 75%. -DENVER, Feb. 19, 2025.
news.summary: A new Chrome browser extension has been released by Proof Technology, Inc. on Feb. 19, 2025. This technology leader in legal service of process, eFiling, and mailing has reported a 75% reduction in handling time due to integration. The extension aims to automate document handling for law firms, streamlining processes and increasing efficiency in service of process.

news.headline: Tips from SCORE mentors help small business owners prepare for tax season; avoid last-minute rush. (Tweet length)
news.summary: Prepare your business for tax season with valuable advice and support from SCORE mentors. In a recent report, it was highlighted that many small business owners struggle during tax season, with about 40% of them facing difficulties due to last-minute preparations. To avoid this, it is crucial for businesses to plan ahead and utilize available resources effectively. SCORE mentors emphasize the importance of organizing financial documents early, staying updated on tax regulations, and seeking professional guidance when needed. By following these strategies, small business owners can streamline the tax filing process and ensure compliance with regulations.

news.headline: Cohen Children’s Medical Center approved for heart transplants by NY State, 1st on Long Island, 55% pediatric transplants.
news.summary: In New Hyde Park, N.Y., the New York State Department of Health has recommended approval for the opening of a heart transplant center at Cohen Children’s Medical Center by Northwell Health on Feb. 18. This would mark the first pediatric heart transplant program on Long Island, adding to the comprehensive pediatric care services provided by the facility. Data from the United Network of Organ Sharing reveals that 55 percent of all pediatric heart transplants nationwide are carried out.

news.headline: Market wrap: Stocks fall due to new tariff threats. Complete news on Bloomberg.
XRP's price volatility is leading to concerns about another potential crash. Stay updated on the latest market trends.
news.summary: Last month, around 200,000 people in the city were affected by a power outage lasting over 12 hours. The blackout was caused by a damaged transformer at the main power station. This incident resulted in approximately $1.5 million in economic losses due to businesses being forced to close during the outage. The city's utility company has since stated they will be investing $3 million to upgrade and improve the power infrastructure to prevent such incidents in the future.

news.headline: Investors are focusing on biotech sector as cancer therapy market grows; $500 billion investment for AI-driven data centers.
news.summary: On February 19, 2025, a news commentary was released by USA News Group on behalf of Oncolytics Biotech Inc. The commentary discussed the $500 billion investment in Project Stargate, which is focused on transforming AI-driven data centers. This initiative has generated significant excitement, but also raised concerns within the industry.

news.headline: Midea receives Intertek award, displays innovation in heat pumps at AHR Expo 2025. Focus on workforce development and energy-efficient solutions. Efforts highlighted in Orlando, Fla. Feb. 19, 2025.
news.summary: In Orlando, Florida on February 19, 2025, a focus on cutting-edge technology, workforce development programs, and accessible energy-efficient solutions was highlighted. At the forefront of this movement is Midea, responding to the increasing demand for high-efficiency electrified heating solutions in North America. This indicates a significant shift towards environmentally friendly and effective heating options in the region.

news.headline: SNA International releases DNAConnect 2.0 in Feb. 19, 2025 - latest version of forensic DNA platform with expanded features.
news.summary: In Alexandria, Virginia, on February 19, 2025, SNA International introduced DNAConnect 2.0, the newest iteration of its top forensic DNA data management system. Enhancing the capabilities of DNAConnect 1.0, this update offers additional features to users.

news.headline: Proofpoint ranked #1 in 4 out of 5 use cases in 2025 Gartner Critical Capabilities Report for Email Security Platforms.
news.summary: A cybersecurity and compliance company based in Sunnyvale, California, Proofpoint Inc., has achieved top rankings in the 2025 Gartner Critical Capabilities Report for Email Security Platforms. The company holds the number one position in four out of five Use Cases, following its acknowledgment as a Leader in the 2024 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Email Security Platforms due to its strong Completeness of Vision and Ability to Execute. These accomplishments underscore Proofpoint's industry leadership and expertise, demonstrating its continued commitment to providing top-tier cybersecurity solutions.

news.headline: 76th issue of White House History Quarterly released, featuring "Animals at Work in White House History."
news.summary: The latest issue, the 76th, of the renowned magazine White House History Quarterly titled "Animals at Work in White House History" has been published by The White House Historical Association. This release highlights the significance of animals throughout the history of the White House. The magazine is well-known for its quality content and insightful articles, maintaining its reputation as an award-winning publication. This edition delves into the role of animals in White House history, shedding light on interesting perspectives. The White House Historical Association continues its tradition of providing enriching historical insights through this publication, contributing to a deeper understanding of the White House's past.

news.headline: Latino professionals redefining leadership in era of AI, remote work & digital transformation. ALPFA Convention 2025 in Las Vegas from July 26-31.
news.summary: The ALPFA Convention 2025, titled Momentum: Leaders in Motion, is set to occur from July 26 to July 31 in Las Vegas. This convention recognizes the crucial role of leadership in adapting to evolving industries and making long-lasting contributions. The event will focus on how key figures can drive change and leave a mark across generations, emphasizing the importance of dynamic leadership in times of rapid transformation.

news.headline: FERMÀT launches Agency Accelerator Program in San Francisco on Feb. 19, 2025, empowering agencies for growth.
news.summary: In San Francisco on February 19, 2025, FERMÀT, a prominent commerce experience platform, unveiled its Agency Accelerator Program. This program aims to assist agencies in creating shoppable, native-style content on various social and digital platforms. The initiative signifies a significant move by FERMÀT to support agencies in enhancing their commerce capabilities.

news.headline: Ally Financial CFO Russ Hutchinson to present at RBC Capital Markets Conference on March 5, 2025 at 9:20 a.m. ET.
news.summary: On February 19, 2025, in Charlotte, North Carolina, Ally Financial Inc.'s Chief Financial Officer Russ Hutchinson is scheduled to speak at the RBC Capital Markets Financial Institutions Conference on March 5, 2025, around 9:20 a.m. Eastern Time. The event will be live-streamed online. Ally Financial Inc. is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol ALLY.

news.headline: Underdog re-signs Ma$e and Cam'ron for their show "It Is What It Is." Brooklyn-based company growing fast.
news.summary: Brooklyn-based sports gaming company, Underdog, has bolstered its partnerships by renewing contracts with platinum-selling recording artists Ma$e and Cam'ron. The company, known for its rapid growth in the sports gaming and media sector in the U.S., recently solidified deals with the artists. The renewal, announced on Feb. 19, 2025, signifies Underdog's commitment to aligning with top talent. This move is crucial for both parties, as it enhances brand visibility and reaches wider audiences. The news showcases the strong foundation of Underdog, highlighting its dedication to collaboration and expansion.
